Project.NAME: japan-travel-rag-mcp
Project.keywords: japan-travel, mcp, fastmcp, oauth-proxy, logto, tg-chat-rag, root-auth, admin-ui, zod, contract-first
Project.annotation: Simplified target architecture keeps existing four proxy tools and uses FastMCP OAuth Proxy only on /mcp while preserving ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN-protected /admin surface.

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Runtime config validation for OAuth Proxy, tg-chat-rag proxy settings, and admin root auth settings.

fn-loadConfig.description: Validate env and build typed AppConfig.

type-AppConfig.description: App config including tg-chat-rag, admin token, public URL, and OAuth proxy credentials.

M-LOGGER.NAME: Logger
M-LOGGER.purpose: Structured logger factory used by all runtime modules.

fn-createLogger.description: Create scoped logger with block-based log conventions.

M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS.NAME: ToolContracts
M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS.purpose: Tool schema registry and validators for current proxied tool set.

schema-SearchMessagesInputPublic.description: Public schema for search_messages with filters.chat_ids forbidden.

const-TOOL_INPUT_JSON_SCHEMAS.description: Tool descriptions and parameter contracts consumed by runtime registration.

M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT.NAME: TgChatRagClient
M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT.purpose: HTTP methods adapter for tg-chat-rag upstream API.

type-UpstreamCallError.description: Normalized upstream error surface for protocol/timeout/http failures.

M-AUTH-PROXY.NAME: FastMcpOauthProxy
M-AUTH-PROXY.purpose: FastMCP OAuthProxy integration for /mcp authentication backed by Logto OIDC upstream endpoints.

fn-createOauthProxy.description: Create OAuthProxy and provide authorization server metadata for FastMCP oauth config.

type-OauthProxyDeps.description: Validated dependency bundle for proxy construction.

M-TOOL-PROXY.NAME: ToolProxyService
M-TOOL-PROXY.purpose: Tool execution orchestration: validate input, apply policy, call upstream, normalize MCP result.

fn-executeTool.description: Main proxy execution method for all supported tools.

fn-buildUpstreamPayloadWithPolicy.description: Inject internal chat scope for search_messages.

fn-authenticateAdmin.description: Validate login token and issue signed session cookie.

fn-requireAdminSession.description: Allow/deny decision for protected admin routes.

fn-clearAdminSession.description: Generate cookie invalidation header for logout.

M-ADMIN-UI.NAME: AdminUiRoutes
M-ADMIN-UI.purpose: Server-rendered admin login and ops routes guarded by AdminAuth.

M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME.NAME: FastMcpRuntime
M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME.purpose: Construct FastMCP runtime, register current tool surface, configure OAuth Proxy on /mcp, and mount admin routes.
M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME.depends: M-CONFIG, M-LOGGER, M-AUTH-PROXY, M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS, M-TOOL-PROXY, M-ADMIN-UI

fn-createFastMcpRuntime.description: Build FastMCP instance with oauth proxy and route extension.

fn-registerProxyTools.description: Register current four tool handlers with Zod schemas.

fn-mountAdminRoutes.description: Mount /admin routes through Hono app returned by getApp().

M-SERVER.NAME: ServerMain
M-SERVER.purpose: Bootstrap config and dependencies, then start FastMCP HTTP stream runtime.
M-SERVER.depends: M-CONFIG, M-LOGGER, M-AUTH-PROXY, M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT, M-TOOL-PROXY, M-ADMIN-UI, M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME

fn-main.description: Initialize runtime dependencies and start server lifecycle.

M-ROOT-ENTRYPOINT.NAME: RootEntrypoint
M-ROOT-ENTRYPOINT.purpose: Top-level process bootstrap and fatal error mapping.

fn-bootstrap.description: Invoke main() and terminate process on fatal startup error.

M-MCP-AUTH-PROVIDER.NAME: McpAuthProvider
M-MCP-AUTH-PROVIDER.purpose: Legacy mcp-auth provider integration scheduled for removal after OAuth Proxy migration.

fn-initMcpAuth.description: Legacy provider init kept only during transition.

M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER.NAME: McpAuthAdapter
M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER.purpose: Legacy authenticate(request) bridge scheduled for removal after OAuth Proxy migration.

fn-authenticateFastMcpRequest.description: Legacy request auth adapter for mcp-auth flow.

M-DB.NAME: DrizzleDb
M-DB.purpose: Legacy PostgreSQL bootstrap used by previously planned API-key lifecycle.

fn-createDb.description: Legacy DB bootstrap retained pending cleanup.

M-API-KEY-REPOSITORY.NAME: ApiKeyRepository
M-API-KEY-REPOSITORY.purpose: Legacy API-key repository outside simplified runtime target.

M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER-TEST.NAME: McpAuthAdapterTests
M-MCP-AUTH-ADAPTER-TEST.purpose: Legacy auth adapter tests to be replaced by OAuth Proxy integration tests.

M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME-SMOKE.NAME: FastMcpRuntimeSmokeTests
M-FASTMCP-RUNTIME-SMOKE.purpose: Runtime smoke tests for tool registration and dispatch behavior.

fn-FastMcpRuntimeSmokeTests.description: Tool exposure and dispatch smoke coverage.

M-SERVER-INTEGRATION-TEST.NAME: ServerIntegrationTests
M-SERVER-INTEGRATION-TEST.purpose: End-to-end checks for /mcp auth flow boundaries and /admin behavior.

fn-ServerIntegrationTests.description: Integration coverage for transport/auth route isolation.

M-ADMIN-UI-OPS-TEST.NAME: AdminUiOpsRouteTests
M-ADMIN-UI-OPS-TEST.purpose: Regression checks for root-token admin login/session and ops rendering.

fn-AdminUiOpsRouteTests.description: Admin auth and ops route behavior coverage.

M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS-TEST.NAME: ToolContractsTests
M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS-TEST.purpose: Deterministic validation checks for four-tool schema contract and stable SchemaValidationError behavior.

fn-ToolContractsTests.description: Focused coverage for allowlist, schema metadata, forbidden filters.chat_ids, and validation detail stability.

M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT-TEST.NAME: TgChatRagClientTests
M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT-TEST.purpose: Deterministic tests for tg-chat-rag methods-call URL construction, timeout behavior, HTTP error mapping, and success response parsing.

fn-TgChatRagClientTests.description: Focused coverage for callMethod success and normalized upstream error branches.

M-TOOL-PROXY-TEST.NAME: ToolProxyServiceTests
M-TOOL-PROXY-TEST.purpose: Deterministic tests for proxy orchestration, allowlist enforcement, search policy injection, and upstream error mapping.

fn-ToolProxyServiceTests.description: Focused coverage for validate-policy-upstream-normalize flow and proxy error codes.

DF-MCP-OAUTH.NAME: mcp oauth proxy flow
DF-MCP-OAUTH.step-1: Client starts OAuth flow through FastMCP endpoints.
DF-MCP-OAUTH.step-2: M-AUTH-PROXY exchanges code/tokens with Logto upstream.
DF-MCP-OAUTH.step-3: Authenticated session can execute registered /mcp tools.

DF-TOOL-PROXY.NAME: tool proxy flow
DF-TOOL-PROXY.step-3: M-TOOL-PROXY applies policy and calls M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT.
DF-TOOL-PROXY.step-4: Normalized result is returned via MCP transport.

DF-ADMIN-ROOT-AUTH.NAME: admin root auth flow
DF-ADMIN-ROOT-AUTH.step-2: M-ADMIN-AUTH verifies ROOT_AUTH_TOKEN and issues session cookie.
